fx-fore.label: Fore
fx-fore.help: Root container for a Fore application. Establishes the processing scope and manages session initialization, UI refresh, and messaging.

attrs.desc: Automatically generates missing XML data nodes based on UI binding expressions.
CSS selector — excludes matching elements from template expression processing.
Event name that triggers Fore initialization instead of default DOMContentLoaded.
CSS selectors of targets to monitor for the init-on event.
Prompts confirmation when unsaved data modifications are detected.
Loads external fx-fore content from another HTML file.
Displays error messages as toast notifications when present.

fx-model.label: Model
fx-model.help: Core data management component. Responsible for creating and maintaining the Main Dependency Graph (MDG). Contains instances, binds, submissions and functions. Every Fore application has exactly one model.

fx-instance.label: Instance
fx-instance.help: Holds a data tree (XML, JSON, or HTML). Every Fore form needs at least one. The first instance is the default, accessible as instance().

attrs.desc: Unique identifier — used in XPath as instance("id"). First instance is "default".
Data format: xml (default), json, or html.
URL to fetch initial instance data from (HTTP GET).
CORS credential policy.
Set to share this instance with nested fx-fore elements.
Defines namespace for unprefixed XPath expressions within this instance.

fx-bind.label: Bind
fx-bind.help: Attaches declarative constraints and calculations to instance nodes. No child elements.

attrs.desc: XPath selecting the node(s) this bind constrains.
XPath expression — result is written into the node.
XPath boolean — true() makes the field required.
XPath boolean — false() marks the value invalid.
XPath boolean — true() prevents editing.
XPath boolean — false() hides bound controls.
Data type for coercion and validation (xs:string, xs:integer, xs:date, …)
Message shown when constraint fails.

fx-submission.label: Submission
fx-submission.help: Defines how form data is sent or received over HTTP. Triggered by fx-send. Add fx-header children for custom headers.

attrs.desc: Identifier for targeting via fx-send submission="id".
HTTP method.
Target URL.
XPath selecting the data to submit (default: default instance root).
Instance ID to use when replace='instance'.
Content-Type for the request.
Expected Content-Type of the response (defaults to mediatype).
What to do with the response.
CSS selector for targeted response insertion (when replace='target').
XPath to target node for instance replacement.
XPath expression for response node insertion.
Serialization type.
How to handle non-relevant nodes.
Set to "false" to skip validation before submit.
CORS credential policy.

fx-function.label: Function
fx-function.help: Defines a custom XPath function inline, in XPath/XQuery or JavaScript. The function name must use the local: prefix.

attrs.desc: Function declaration with parameter types.
Implementation language.

fx-functionlib.label: FunctionLib
fx-functionlib.help: References an external XQuery module, making its functions available throughout the form.

attrs.desc: URL of the XQuery function library module.
Optional namespace prefix to prevent naming conflicts.

fx-connection.label: Connection
fx-connection.help: Opens a WebSocket connection to synchronize data across windows. Messages can bind directly to instance data.

attrs.desc: WebSocket endpoint URL.
Format of transmitted messages.
Heartbeat interval in milliseconds (0 = off).

fx-control.label: Control
fx-control.help: The main editing widget. Binds to an instance node via ref. Renders the appropriate HTML input. Add a child element with class="widget" for the actual input.

attrs.desc: XPath pointing to the instance node this control edits.
Optional display label (rendered as <label> child).
"text" (default) or "node" to pass DOM trees.
When to write back: "blur" (default) or "enter".
Delay in ms before writing value back.
Hide until the control has a value.
Imports external ForeBody as widget.
XPath to override the inherited context node.
Creates non-existing attribute nodes automatically when present.
Default instance data for imported widgets (XPath).
Attaches control to shadowDOM when present.
Custom DOM property for setting widget value (default: value).
CORS credential policy for url-loaded widgets.
CSS selector for event listener attachment point (default: .widget element).

fx-output.label: Output
fx-output.help: Displays a read-only value from the model. Not editable by the user. Supports HTML and Markdown rendering via mediatype.

attrs.desc: XPath selecting the value to display.
Inline XPath expression calculating a string value (alternative to ref).
Content rendering type for the output.

fx-group.label: Group
fx-group.help: Groups related controls. Sets an optional XPath context node for all children. Renders as a fieldset.

attrs.desc: XPath context node for all children.
Group heading / fieldset legend.
Identifier for CSS / scripting.

fx-repeat.label: Repeat
fx-repeat.help: Repeats its template for each node in a nodeset. One fx-repeatitem is created per data node. Use with fx-insert / fx-delete to manage the list.

attrs.desc: XPath nodeset — one repeat-item is rendered per node.
Required when you need the index() XPath function.

fx-trigger.label: Trigger
fx-trigger.help: A button (or any interactive element) that fires action children when activated. Add action elements as children to define what happens.

attrs.desc: Optional XPath context / binding for readonly/relevant.

fx-switch.label: Switch
fx-switch.help: Shows exactly one fx-case child at a time. Toggle cases with fx-toggle. Can bind to a data node to auto-select the case whose id matches the value.

attrs.desc: XPath binding — toggles to the case whose id matches the value.
Identifier used by fx-toggle.

fx-case.label: Case
fx-case.help: Defines an individual panel within an fx-switch. Exactly one case is visible at a time.

attrs.desc: Unique identifier used with fx-toggle to show this case.
Optional descriptive text for this case.
URL for loading case content dynamically.
CSS selector to extract specific elements from an external src.

fx-dialog.label: Dialog
fx-dialog.help: A modal dialog panel. Show/hide with fx-show / fx-hide actions.

attrs.desc: Required — used to target this dialog with fx-show/fx-hide.

fx-alert.label: Alert
fx-alert.help: Messaging component for displaying validation errors or event-triggered notifications.

fx-upload.label: Upload
fx-upload.help: A file-upload widget that puts file content, filename and MIME type into instance nodes.

attrs.desc: XPath pointing to the instance node to receive the file content.
Restricts uploads to specified media types (e.g. image/*, application/pdf).
XPath expression indicating where to store the uploaded filename.
XPath expression indicating where to store the media type.

fx-droptarget.label: Drop Target
fx-droptarget.help: A drag-and-drop target zone. Accepts dragged elements and triggers actions on drop.

attrs.desc: CSS selector matching draggable elements that are accepted.
Operation type on drop.

fx-items.label: Items
fx-items.help: Provides a dynamic list of options for a select/datalist inside an fx-control.

attrs.desc: XPath nodeset providing the option values.
XPath (relative to each item) for the option value.
XPath (relative to each item) for the option label.

fx-setvalue.label: Set Value
fx-setvalue.help: Writes a value to an instance node.

attrs.desc: XPath selecting the target node.
XPath expression yielding the new value.
DOM event that triggers this action. Omit to run on parent activation.
XPath boolean — action only runs when true.
XPath boolean — action repeats while true.
Delay in milliseconds before execution.
ID of the element to attach the listener to.
"stop" to prevent event bubbling.
Event phase.

fx-insert.label: Insert
fx-insert.help: Inserts a new node into a nodeset.

attrs.desc: XPath nodeset to insert into.
XPath selecting the template node to clone.
Index position in the nodeset for insertion.
XPath pointing to the parent node context.
Insert before or after ref.
Preserves text values from origin nodes when present.
DOM event that triggers this action. Omit to run on parent activation.
XPath boolean — action only runs when true.
XPath boolean — action repeats while true.
Delay in milliseconds before execution.
ID of the element to attach the listener to.
"stop" to prevent event bubbling.
Event phase.
XPath selecting the node(s) to delete.
DOM event that triggers this action. Omit to run on parent activation.
XPath boolean — action only runs when true.
XPath boolean — action repeats while true.
Delay in milliseconds before execution.
ID of the element to attach the listener to.
"stop" to prevent event bubbling.
Event phase.

fx-append.label: Append
fx-append.help: Appends a new entry to an fx-repeat. Deprecated — prefer fx-insert.

attrs.desc: XPath nodeset to append to.
ID of the fx-repeat that receives the new entry.
DOM event that triggers this action. Omit to run on parent activation.
XPath boolean — action only runs when true.
XPath boolean — action repeats while true.
Delay in milliseconds before execution.
ID of the element to attach the listener to.
"stop" to prevent event bubbling.
Event phase.

fx-send.label: Send
fx-send.help: Triggers an fx-submission. Use '#reload' as submission value to refresh the window.

attrs.desc: ID of the fx-submission to trigger. Use '#reload' to reload the window.
Overrides the submission's target (supports template expressions).
Overrides the submission's URL (supports template expressions).
DOM event that triggers this action. Omit to run on parent activation.
XPath boolean — action only runs when true.
XPath boolean — action repeats while true.
Delay in milliseconds before execution.
"stop" to prevent event bubbling.
Event phase.

fx-dispatch.label: Dispatch
fx-dispatch.help: Fires a custom DOM event. Add fx-property children to pass event detail parameters.

attrs.desc: Event name to dispatch.
ID of the element that should receive the event. Broadcasts to document if omitted.
DOM event that triggers this action. Omit to run on parent activation.
XPath boolean — action only runs when true.
XPath boolean — action repeats while true.
Delay in milliseconds before execution.
ID of the element to attach the listener to.
"stop" to prevent event bubbling.
Event phase.

fx-toggle.label: Toggle
fx-toggle.help: Toggles an fx-case inside an fx-switch.

attrs.desc: ID of the fx-case to show.
DOM event that triggers this action. Omit to run on parent activation.
XPath boolean — action only runs when true.
XPath boolean — action repeats while true.
Delay in milliseconds before execution.
ID of the element to attach the listener to.
"stop" to prevent event bubbling.
Event phase.
ID of the fx-dialog to show.
DOM event that triggers this action. Omit to run on parent activation.
XPath boolean — action only runs when true.
XPath boolean — action repeats while true.
Delay in milliseconds before execution.
ID of the element to attach the listener to.
"stop" to prevent event bubbling.
Event phase.
ID of the fx-dialog to hide.
DOM event that triggers this action. Omit to run on parent activation.
XPath boolean — action only runs when true.
XPath boolean — action repeats while true.
Delay in milliseconds before execution.
ID of the element to attach the listener to.
"stop" to prevent event bubbling.
Event phase.

fx-setfocus.label: Set Focus
fx-setfocus.help: Moves keyboard focus to an fx-control element.

attrs.desc: ID of the fx-control element to focus.
When present, also selects the value of the target control.
DOM event that triggers this action. Omit to run on parent activation.
XPath boolean — action only runs when true.
XPath boolean — action repeats while true.
Delay in milliseconds before execution.
ID of the element to attach the listener to.
"stop" to prevent event bubbling.
Event phase.

fx-load.label: Load
fx-load.help: Loads content into a page, opens a new tab, or replaces the current browser window.

attrs.desc: URL source for loading external content.
Where content loads: '_self', '_blank', or '#element-id'.
Event name to wait for before the load completes.
DOM event that triggers this action. Omit to run on parent activation.
XPath boolean — action only runs when true.
XPath boolean — action repeats while true.
Delay in milliseconds before execution.
ID of the element to attach the listener to.
"stop" to prevent event bubbling.
Event phase.

fx-message.label: Message
fx-message.help: Displays a message to the user.

attrs.desc: XPath expression resolving to the message content.
Message display mode.
DOM event that triggers this action. Omit to run on parent activation.
XPath boolean — action only runs when true.
XPath boolean — action repeats while true.
Delay in milliseconds before execution.
ID of the element to attach the listener to.
"stop" to prevent event bubbling.
Event phase.

fx-reset.label: Reset
fx-reset.help: Resets an instance back to its initial state.

attrs.desc: ID of the fx-instance to reset.
DOM event that triggers this action. Omit to run on parent activation.
XPath boolean — action only runs when true.
XPath boolean — action repeats while true.
Delay in milliseconds before execution.
ID of the element to attach the listener to.
"stop" to prevent event bubbling.
Event phase.

fx-setattribute.label: Set Attribute
fx-setattribute.help: Creates and sets a DOM attribute on an element.

attrs.desc: XPath or ID of the target element.
Attribute name to set.
XPath expression for the attribute value.
DOM event that triggers this action. Omit to run on parent activation.
XPath boolean — action only runs when true.
XPath boolean — action repeats while true.
Delay in milliseconds before execution.

fx-refresh.label: Refresh
fx-refresh.help: Triggers immediate refresh of controls or the entire model.

attrs.desc: ID of a specific fx-control to refresh (default: full refresh).
When present, enforces a complete refresh regardless of change tracking.
When present, searches upward for the nearest fx-control to refresh.
DOM event that triggers this action. Omit to run on parent activation.
XPath boolean — action only runs when true.
XPath boolean — action repeats while true.
Delay in milliseconds before execution.
ID of the element to attach the listener to.

Event phase.
XPath of the node to replace.
XPath expression pointing to the replacement node.

fx-call.help: Calls an action block or a custom function defined with fx-function.

attrs.desc: Identifier of an action block to invoke.
Custom function name with required arguments.

fx-confirm.help: Displays a confirmation dialog. Subsequent sibling actions only execute if the user confirms.

attrs.desc: Text displayed in the confirmation dialog.
ID of the element this action is attached to.

XPath boolean — action repeats while true.

fx-copy.help: Copies text value to the clipboard.

attrs.desc: XPath of the node whose value to copy to clipboard.
DOM event that triggers this action. Omit to run on parent activation.
XPath boolean — action only runs when true.
XPath boolean — action repeats while true.

fx-toggleboolean.label: Toggle Boolean
fx-toggleboolean.help: Toggles a boolean value (true/false) in the data structure.

attrs.desc: XPath reference pointing to the boolean value to toggle.
DOM event that triggers this action. Omit to run on parent activation.
XPath boolean — action only runs when true.
XPath boolean — action repeats while true.
Delay in milliseconds before execution.

fx-return.label: Return
fx-return.help: Returns a value from within a bound Fore element (e.g. an imported widget).

attrs.desc: XPath reference pointing to the bound node to return.
XPath expression identifying a replacement node.
DOM event that triggers this action. Omit to run on parent activation.
XPath boolean — action only runs when true.
XPath boolean — action repeats while true.

fx-unmodified.label: Unmodified
fx-unmodified.help: Resets the modified state of the fx-fore element. Typically triggered after a successful submission.

attrs.desc: DOM event that triggers this action. Omit to run on parent activation.
XPath boolean — action only runs when true.
XPath boolean — action repeats while true.
Delay in milliseconds before execution.
